vincristine.name: Vincristine
vincristine.note: CHOP protocol. Strict IV — extravasation = necrosis. ⚠ Lymphoma in rabbits: use weight-based dosing instead, RABBITS PRONE TO GI STASIS.

vincristine_rabbit.name: Vincristine (RABBIT)
vincristine_rabbit.note: ⚠⚠ Rabbits highly susceptible to GI stasis post-vincristine. Pre-treat with prokinetic + force-feed prep. Monitor stool daily.

cyclophos.name: Cyclophosphamide
cyclophos.note: Force diuresis morning of dose — hemorrhagic cystitis risk. CBC nadir d7–10.

doxorubicin.name: Doxorubicin
doxorubicin.note: Cumulative cardiotox max 180–240 mg/m² lifetime. Echo baseline + q150 mg/m². Strict IV slow over 20 min.

cytarabine.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
cytarabine.note: CNS lymphoma / MUO. SC q12h × 2 days or IV CRI 24h.

lomustine.name: Lomustine (CCNU)
lomustine.note: PO. ⚠ Hepatotoxicity — ALT q dose. CBC at d7/14/21.

lasparag.name: L-Asparaginase
lasparag.note: ⚠ Anaphylaxis on repeat dosing — pre-treat diphenhydramine 2 mg/kg IM 30 min before. Coagulopathy risk.
